about.title: About Us
about.description: Discover who we are, our mission, and the passion behind every journey we craft for travelers worldwide.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Get in touch with our team for questions, support, or custom travel help.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.description: Find answers to common questions about our services, bookings, and policies

flights.title: Flights
flights.description: Compare and book flights to hundreds of destinations with the best fares from top airlines.

flight-search.title: Flight Search
flight-search.description: Search through thousands of routes to find your perfect flight at the best price available.

flightbooking.title: Flight Booking
flightbooking.description: Complete your flight reservation securely. Review your itinerary and confirm your booking.

cars.title: Car Rentals
cars.description: Browse premium vehicles for every journey — from economy to luxury, at unbeatable rates.

car-search.title: Car Search
car-search.description: Find the perfect rental car for your trip. Filter by type, price, and features.

carbooking.title: Car Booking
carbooking.description: Finalize your car rental. Review vehicle details and confirm your reservation.

hotels.title: Hotels
hotels.description: Explore handpicked hotels and resorts worldwide — from boutique stays to five-star luxury.

hotel-search.title: Hotel Search
hotel-search.description: Search accommodations by destination, dates, and amenities to find your ideal stay.

hotelbooking.title: Hotel Booking
hotelbooking.description: Secure your room reservation. Review hotel details, amenities, and confirm your stay.

login.title: Login
login.description: Sign in to your TravelTourUp account to manage bookings and access exclusive deals.

signup.title: Create Account
signup.description: Join TravelTourUp today and unlock personalized travel deals and seamless booking.

payment.title: Payment
payment.description: Complete your purchase securely. We protect every transaction with industry-standard encryption.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal information at TravelTourUp.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Review the terms and conditions governing your use of TravelTourUp services.

profile.title: Profile
